body: review-spec cycle 1 REQUEST_CHANGES: ac-04 reframed (METHOD.md §6b semantics, drop 'silent seed', drop CLI/MCP parity verification — implementation is skill-prose); ac-12 added for CLAUDE.md @-import wiring (HIGH finding — without this, STYLE.md sits on disk and doesn't load)

drive completed: STYLE.md shipped as plugin-canonical (parallel to METHOD.md), BLUF/Decision-Brief framing dropped across METHOD.md + SKILL.md cascade, pillar #1 renamed to Author-level interaction; ac-11 deferred observation pending next plugin release; review-spec cycle-2 APPROVE, review-pr cycle-1 APPROVE with 1 LOW addressed inline
